title: Blood Birch
body:
Ever wantad an actuall wood set that´s red?

Here is the perfect mod for it! With this mod you can rarely find in birch wood biomes, a "wierd" looking tree that seems to be looking at me?

The Blood birch trees are inspired from a meme of a birch tree with "eyes" and a game called: "Bloodbark".

**Is that just it?**

-No, you can collect the birch's sap and craft cool things! (More in the future), and there's also, other beutifull plants!
